This executable ontology owns the C7 Security / Policy invariant surface: trust tiers, policy bundle shape, policy targets, unsafe bypass default-deny, and adjacent execution boundaries.

The policy-bundle loader remains a dedicated evidence artifact and is linked from this invariant index.
